item.title: [Unsupervised Learning] Ep 84: OpenAI’s Chief Scientist on Continual Learning Hype, RL Beyond Code, & Future Alignment Directions
item.description:
Speaker 1 | 00:00 - 00:09 I definitely agree that continual learning is really the thing. It's really the thing that we're building, but I don't really think this is like a problem that's ignored and and off the path of what we're doing currently. Think it it is what we're working towards.
Speaker 2 | 00:09 - 00:13 What are like the other research areas within alignment that you're paying attention to or that you think are promising?
Speaker 1 | 00:13 - 00:19 A lot of the, like, longer term ch...
